title: lithocarpus lemeeanus
intro: Lithocarpus lemeeanus is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. The bark and leaves of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus lemeeanus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus lemeeanus typically involve boiling the bark and leaves in water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
